name: addTimeToMeasurementStartTime
title: addTimeToMeasurementStartTime
description: Calculates the absolute date/time of the measurement start plus an offset (e.g. a timestamp).
In CANoeoffline mode, the function returns the oldest start time of those stored in the logging files.

parameters.name: timeSpan
parameters.description: Time to be added to the measurement start time, e.g. a timestamp of a measured frame.

return: 1 if successful, 0 if not (e.g. array to small).
